title: Study team
text:
Welcome to the babyPHONO study team!
Our group includes clinicians, researchers, and data scientists collaborating to improve the early diagnosis of congenital heart disease.




Dr NeilLawrence



Chief Investigator


PaediatricsRegistrar




Dr SimonClark



Principal Investigator


ConsultantNeonatologist




Dr TamannaWilliams



Head of Recruitment


ConsultantNeonatologist




Professor TimChico



Co-Investigator


Professor ofCardiology




Professor JeremyDawson



Lead statistician


Professor ofStatistics




Dr LouisStokes



co-investigator


Qualitative Researcher




Ms YasminKumar



Intercalated Research student


Student Doctor




Mr AlexanderDarby



Software Designer


Student Doctor

title: babyPHONO
text:
Welcome to the babyPHONO research study website
Please note, this study is not yet recruiting, pending HRA ethical review.
Check back in 2026 for updates after recruitment is open!


For more information please contact n.r.lawrence@sheffield.ac.uk
